# InmuebleBot Architecture

Real estate WhatsApp chatbot for the Argentine market (Obereño zone). Built as a FastAPI service with a dual-routing architecture (System 1 regex + System 2 LLM), specialist-based agent orchestration, hybrid Redis+PostgreSQL memory, and 11+ tools. Handles property search, visit scheduling, FAQ, negotiation, and human handoff — entirely in Spanish.

## Request Flow

```
WhatsApp/Meta
   ↓ (webhook verification + message parse)
app/api/routes/webhook.py
   ↓ (V2 adapter — normalize message, resolve identity)
app/routers/v2_adapter.py
   ↓ (main V2 routing — belief state, S1 shortcut, coordinator fallback)
app/routers/router.py
   ├── S1 shortcut → app/routers/system1.py (24 regex patterns, ≥0.70 confidence)
   └── Coordinator → app/agents/coordinator.py (intent classifier → specialist)
         ├── Specialist: search, scheduling, knowledge, rapport, negotiator
         │    └── S2 Agent → app/agents/s2_agent.py (LLM + tool loop)
         │          └── Tools → app/tools/v2/registry.py (11 registered tools)
         └── Agentic Loop → app/agents/agentic_loop.py (Plan→Act→Observe→Evaluate)
               └── Tools → app/tools/v2/registry.py
   ↓ (persist turn, save working memory)
app/memory/working.py (Redis, 24h TTL)
```

## Key Files (Top 15)

| File | Lines | Role |
|------|-------|------|
| `app/routers/router.py` | 695 | **Central router** — belief state, S1 shortcut, coordinator fallback, persistence |
| `app/api/routes/webhook.py` | 694 | WhatsApp/Meta webhook — signature verification, message parsing, rate limit |
| `app/main.py` | 439 | FastAPI entry point — lifespan, migrations, route mounting |
| `app/routers/system1.py` | 284 | 24 regex patterns (greetings, search, scheduling, FAQ, out-of-scope) |
| `app/agents/coordinator.py` | 305 | Intent classification → 5 specialists, each with filtered tool subset |
| `app/agents/s2_agent.py` | 330 | LLM agent loop: `process_message`, `process_message_multistep`, `process_message_with_specialist` |
| `app/core/config.py` | 324 | Pydantic Settings v2 — DB, Redis, LLM providers, feature flags, TTLs |
| `app/core/state_transitioner.py` | 264 | Entity extraction + fuzzy normalization from user messages |
| `app/core/context_aggregator.py` | 238 | Builds `[CONTEXTO DE LA CONVERSACIÓN]` block for LLM prompts |
| `app/agents/schemas.py` | 230 | Pydantic models: `AgentResponse`, `CSAgentResponse`, etc. |
| `app/core/classifier.py` | 181 | LLM intent classification w/ Pydantic JSON mode + Redis cache |
| `app/routers/v2_adapter.py` | 173 | Bridge between webhook + identity resolution + router |
| `app/core/response_parser.py` | 158 | LLM JSON response parsing (7 fallback strategies) |
| `app/core/belief_state.py` | 151 | `ConversationBeliefState` dataclass — search criteria, scheduling, intents |
| `app/memory/working.py` | 138 | Redis-persistent belief state (24h TTL), save/load working memory |
| `app/tools/v2/registry.py` | 319 | Central tool registry — name→(function, is_async, OpenAI schema) |

**God file:** `app/agents/tools.py` (1924 lines, 13+ async functions, monolithic) — the #1 refactoring target. Planned split into skill-based architecture.

## Feature Flags (in `app/core/config.py`)

| Flag | Type | Default | Effect |
|------|------|---------|--------|
| `USE_V2_ROUTER` | bool | true | Selects V2 router path vs old V1 state-machine agent |
| `LLM_USE_STRICT_SCHEMA` | bool | - | Enforces strict Pydantic schema for LLM responses |
| `LLM_PROVIDER` | str | - | Auto-selects OpenAI, DeepSeek, or OpenRouter client |

Also configurable per-conversation via `bot_settings` in DB.

## V1 vs V2 Routing

| Aspect | V1 (legacy) | V2 (current default) |
|--------|-------------|----------------------|
| State | 15-state enum (`ConversationState`) | Dynamic `ConversationBeliefState` |
| Router | `RealEstateAgent.process_turn()` | `router.py` + S1 + Coordinator |
| Tools | Methods on agent class | Registry-based (`app/tools/v2/`) |
| Entry point | `real_estate_agent.py` | `v2_adapter.py` → `router.py` |
| Migration status | Deprecated in favor of V2 | Active, still has some V1 references |

## Key Architectural Patterns

1. **System 1 + System 2**: S1 (system1.py) handles 24 regex patterns at <1ms with ≥0.70 confidence threshold. Falls through to S2 (coordinator + LLM) if no pattern matches confidently. Pre-LLM shortcut (router.py: `_try_pre_llm_shortcut`) handles 4 fast-paths before even consulting S1.

2. **Coordinator + Specialists**: One `coordinator.py` classifies intent (regex-first, LLM-fallback) and delegates to the right specialist with a filtered tool subset and custom system prompt. 5 specialists: search, scheduling, knowledge, rapport, negotiator.

3. **Agentic Loop** (Phase 9, optional): `agentic_loop.py` — Plan→Act→Observe→Evaluate cycle with hidden CoT thinking. Only used when `coordinate(use_agentic=True)`.

4. **Belief State** (vs old state machine): `ConversationBeliefState` dataclass accumulates entities across turns. State transitions are implicit via entity extraction in `state_transitioner.py`.

5. **Hybrid Parser pattern**: Each parser (date, location, budget, preference, name, reference) has a code path + LLM fallback in a unified `HybridParser` base, registered via `hybrid/registry.py`.

6. **Memory**: Redis working memory (per-turn belief state, 24h TTL) + PostgreSQL persistent (messages, conversations, episodes). `MemoryManager` is the highest-connectivity node (66 edges, bridges 28+ communities).

## Specialists

| Specialist | System Prompt | Tools |
|------------|--------------|-------|
| **search** | Property search | `search_properties`, `get_property_details`, `get_property_images` |
| **scheduling** | Visit scheduling | `schedule_visit`, `get_my_appointments`, `cancel_appointment`, `reschedule_appointment` |
| **knowledge** | FAQ, zone info | `get_faq_answer` |
| **rapport** | Greetings, small talk | `request_human_assistance` |
| **negotiator** | Price discussion | `search_properties` |

## V2 Tools (11 registered in `app/tools/v2/registry.py`)

| Tool | File | Async | Description |
|------|------|-------|-------------|
| `echo` | `echo_tool.py` | No | Echo text back |
| `get_time` | `time_tool.py` | No | Current Argentina time |
| `search_properties` | `search_properties.py` | Yes | Property search with filters |
| `get_property_details` | `get_property_details.py` | Yes | Full property info by ID |
| `get_property_images` | `get_property_images.py` | Yes | Photos by ID |
| `get_faq_answer` | `get_faq_answer.py` | Yes | FAQ responses |
| `schedule_visit` | `schedule_visit.py` | Yes | Book appointment |
| `get_my_appointments` | `get_my_appointments.py` | Yes | List user's appointments |
| `cancel_appointment` | `cancel_appointment.py` | Yes | Cancel appointment |
| `reschedule_appointment` | `reschedule_appointment.py` | Yes | Reschedule appointment |
| `request_human_assistance` | `request_human_assistance.py` | Yes | Transfer to human agent |

Shared helpers in `app/tools/v2/_common.py`: `resolve_session_user`, `fmt_appt`, `pick_appointment`, `_to_arg`.

## God Nodes / Critical Refactoring Points

| Node | Edge Count | Betweenness | Risk |
|------|-----------|-------------|------|
| `get_settings()` (config.py) | 51 | **0.053** (highest) | Every component depends on it — single point of coupling |
| `MemoryManager` | 66 | **0.050** | Bridges 28+ communities; Redis + PG hybrid is complex |
| `route_message()` (router.py) | 34 | **0.036** | Bridges 17 communities; entry/exit for all routing |
| `app/agents/tools.py` | - | - | 1924-line god file, monolithic, planned for skill split |
| `ConversationState` enum | 56 | High (inferred) | V1 artifact, 31 inferred edges suggest hidden coupling |

## Quick Reference: "To add a feature, edit these files"

| What you want | Files to edit |
|---------------|--------------|
| New tool | `app/tools/v2/<tool>.py` + `app/tools/v2/registry.py` (register it) |
| New specialist | `app/agents/coordinator.py` (add Specialist dataclass + tool slice) |
| New S1 pattern | `app/routers/system1.py` (add regex + response) |
| New entity extraction | `app/core/state_transitioner.py` (add pattern) |
| New config flag | `app/core/config.py` (add Pydantic field) |
| New API endpoint | `app/api/routes/` (new route file) + `app/main.py` (mount it) |
| Change LLM provider | `app/agents/cs_llm_client.py` (factory) + `app/core/config.py` (env var) |
| Modify belief state | `app/core/belief_state.py` (dataclass) + `app/core/context_aggregator.py` (rendering) |
| Add DB model | `app/db/models/<model>.py` + Alembic migration |
| New memory store | `app/memory/` (working, episodic, semantic, procedural, etc.) |
| Modify WhatsApp parsing | `app/api/routes/webhook.py` + `app/routers/v2_adapter.py` |
| Add test scenario | `tests/` (simulate endpoint at `/admin/simulate`) |

## Graph Stats

- 250 files, ~277K words, 146 Python files in `app/`
- 5,771 nodes, 7,507 edges, 605 communities in dependency graph
- 90% extracted edges, 10% inferred (avg confidence 0.66)
- 150+ multi-turn test scenarios across property types
